sglang.title: [AMD] skip deterministic inference for MLA FP8 test
sglang.author: bingxche
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #23303 added --enable-deterministic-inference to test/registered/mla/test_mla_fp8.py to stabilize MGSM scores around the 0.8 threshold. The flag works on NVIDIA but breaks the AMD CI partition that runs the same test (stage-b-test-1-gpu-small-amd, partition 5). Failing run:

https://gi

sglang.title: [AMD] Use bpreshuffle FP8 blockscale GEMM to replace ABScale GEMM
sglang.author: RolaoDenthu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
AITER's gemm_a8w8_blockscale_bpreshuffle is a faster FP8 block-scaled GEMM that requires preshuffled weights. By preshuffling once at load time, we pay the layout cost upfront and speed up every forward pass.
This PR wires up the preshuffled kernel as the FP8 block-scale path on AMD, yiel

sglang.title: docs: add Hunyuan 3 Preview cookbook

sglang.title: [fix] Fix dynamic chunking profiling crash on GLM-5 models
sglang.author: Baichuan7
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #23057
When --enable-dynamic-chunking is used with GLM-5  (have DeepEP ), the profiling phase crashes with AttributeError: _is_extend_in_batch. This silently disables dynamic chunking and also causes KV cache memory leaks and NCCL timeouts on non-first PP ranks.
Modifications

pytho

Enable OpenTelemetry tracing for the diffusion/multimodal generation subsystem (multimodal_gen) to achieve feature parity with the SRT (LLM) runtime, which already has comprehensive OTel instrumentation. This is the initial scaffolding — downstream consumers (e.g., Dynamo) need tracing su

sglang.title: Fix: fallback to torch API when NVML memory query is not supported
sglang.author: AethoceSora
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
On some unified memory platforms such as GB10, querying device memory through NVML may return NVMLError_NotSupported. In the current initialization flow, SGLang relies on NVML to obtain device memory information during server argument adjustment. As a result, inference initialization fail

sglang.title: Fix MoE no_combine: skip router weight in down projection
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

When no_combine mode is enabled, the down projection kernel should not apply router weights (the combine step handles weighting). Previously only apply_router_weight_on_input was checked; now no_combine is also checked.
Change BaseDispatcher.quant_config default from None to {} to avoid Att

sglang.title: Pre-set SWA cache location in CudaGraphRunner
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For hybrid SWA models (e.g. Gemma), the SWA cache location was not pre-set in CudaGraphRunner, causing CUDA graph capture to miss the fast path in set_kv_buffer and fall back to the per-layer translate_loc_from_full_to_swa translation during replay.
Changes

Add out_cache_loc_swa buffer t

sglang.title: Move expert_mask_gpu from FusedMoE layer to StandardDispatcher

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The aiter expert_mask_gpu tensor is a pure function of the dispatcher's local_expert_mapping and num_local_experts, but today it lives on FusedMoE and is computed in FusedMoE.forward_impl. Having the layer reach into self.dispatcher.local_expert_mapping to build state that it then exposes

Fix RuntimeError: Already borrowed that crashes concurrent tool-call requests when HuggingFace's Rust tokenizer backend is accessed simultaneously from tool parsers in the request handling loop and from AsyncMicrobatchTokenizer in the rende

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Ensure dummy prefill warmup batch is not misclassified as a uniform decode batch.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Avoid mutating `chat_template_kwargs` in `HYV3ReasoningParser` initialization
vllm.author: BugenZhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The same chat_template_kwargs object might be passed multiple times to initialize reasoning parsers. We should avoid mutating it; otherwise, later reads might encounter incorrect values.

vllm.title: [Deprecate] Deprecate LLM.reward offline api, use LLM.encode instead.
vllm.author: noooop
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The llm.reward offline API only supports token reward models (pooling_task="token_classify"), but in fact we also support sequence reward models (e.g. Skywork/Skywork-Reward-V2-Qwen3-0.6B, pooling_task="classify"), which makes this interface confusing.
Let’s deprecate the llm.reward offline

vllm.title: [XPU][CI] Fix Docker cleanup races on Intel CI runners
vllm.author: zxd1997066
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes Docker cleanup races on Intel CI runners where multiple jobs run concurrently on the same machine. Previously, one job could clean up Docker resources while another job was still pulling or using them, which could lead to failures such as No such container and unexpected image

vllm.title: Support only half types for concat_mla_q kernel
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes concat_mla_q kernel for float32 dtype

Currently in concat_mla_q kernel, q_pe is casted to int* (4 bytes), so ld32_cs loads the rope section in 32 * 4 = 128 bytes, see https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/v0.18.0/csrc/concat_mla_q.cuh#L50-L55. This works correctly if DType
